ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Continued To Mar-25-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Gilbert Jay (attorney) to appear on March 25, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Continued To Nov-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Jay appeared by zoom for Leah Price (executor).

The court noted that at the last hearing Mr. Jay was told to file either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of a report on status of administration. Mr. Jay apologized to the court stating that the matter is still in litigation, that the sole asset of the estate is a 50% interest in a co-op, that he did not get an update from trial counsel and that in all fairness, the trial has not been set yet. Mr. Jay also stated that he cannot do an inventory because he does not know if the 50% interest is in the estate or not, and that Mr. Kangas alleges that the property is in joint tenancy, and he inherits by right of survivorship. Discussion was held regarding the potential value of the 50% interest. Mr. Jay spoke of doing a small estate affidavit and stated that there are no other things in the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court explained the requirements of Probate Code 12200. Mr. Jay stated that he will file something.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To May-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Nicholas Jay, Esq., for Leah Price, Executor.

At the court's query, Mr. Jay offers a status of the Estate and pending Inventory and Appraisal stating that the estate's real property may not be ready to appraise until a pending, related civil matter is resolved.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to May-13-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-06-2023 Continued To Apr-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gilbert Jay, in court, for and with Leah Chen-Price, Personal Representative.

Mr. Jay offers testimony regarding his failure to appear at the previous calling. The court takes the Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause off calendar. Mr. Jay reports of having a petition to approve status of administration ready to file.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-03-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Continued To Mar-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Leah Chen Price and the Attorney Gilbert Y. Jay to appear on March 6, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An order to show cause will also be issued for the same date as to Attorneys Gilbert Y. Jay and Nicholas Jay to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against them for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Dec-08-2005 is admitted to probate. Leah Chen Price is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-06-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
